dimensions.name: testability
dimensions.evidence: The acceptance criteria are mostly mechanical and command-verifiable, using explicit files, exit codes, grep/jq/stat checks, and expected stderr/stdout behavior.

dimensions.name: completeness
dimensions.evidence: Several deliverables are not fully refined in the provided spec content, notably `promote-learnings-schema-fix.md`, `reintegration-schema-consolidation.md`, and `test-isolation-guard.md`, whose AC/test sections are truncated or incomplete.

dimensions.name: consistency
dimensions.evidence: `specialist-symlink-unification.md` says 14 tracked `specialist:*.md` entries are removed, while the upstream acceptance criteria require all 22 entries to be removed from the git index.

dimensions.name: test-scenario-coverage
dimensions.evidence: Multiple non-trivial ACs lack complete WHEN/THEN/verification scenarios in the supplied spec, especially in the truncated `promote-learnings`, `reintegration`, and `test-isolation` sections.

dimensions.name: implementability
dimensions.evidence: The spec gives concrete file paths, function/script names, behaviors, and command patterns that are sufficient for implementation of the described changes.
